dungeon: (TRIO RPE STREAM ~34 entries) ROTF — NEW Ortar taunts + RUNE-BLESSING confirmation (validates D2) + crystal biomes
source: video disc_n7RZ1JzWXXw (572 frames, 102 transitions = ~34 entries, 143 chat; 'started as a trio RPE' per overlay, early clips are trading). Heavy purple/blue CRYSTAL biomes. Chat captured Ortar boss taunts + the rune-blessing feed.
map: DOCUMENTED biomes: purple/blue CRYSTAL CAVERN-style rooms (crystal clusters), blue ICE, tan/sand checkered dungeons, brown dungeons, grey stone. A 'Level 20 Sorcerer' death screen (class Sorcerer confirmed).

bosses.name: Ortar
taunts: Why you serious, why you serious?
Me want to go! Me angery!
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED VERBATIM (boss-colored chat). Ortar is ALREADY BUILT (OCBosses 0x8fd0). NEW taunts enrich it: broken/caveman English ('Me serious', 'Me angery', 'Me want'); 'Ortar make you idle. Hehehi' implies a PARALYZE/idle attack. Confirms the existing 'Me want to go! Me angery!' line. Event: '<Starforce> The Ortar has been defeated'.

mechanics: MAJOR D2 VALIDATION — RUNE BLESSING confirmed VERBATIM: 'Arcane Symbol x 10 consumed, blessed [...]' + 'This symbol contained power beyond [measure?]'. This EXACTLY matches the built D2 mechanic (the /bless command consumes 10 matching rune Symbols to upgrade a rune) — so the '10 Symbols -> bless a rune' loop is footage-accurate. Also: class 'Sorcerer' confirmed (death screen). 'armor of the depths' item traded.
uncertain: Ortar's 'Why you serious' line slightly truncated; its full attack set/HP/drops not isolated. Crystal-cavern dungeon name not printed. The rune-bless flavor line ('power beyond ...') truncated at crop edge.
confidence: HIGH for: the NEW Ortar taunts (verbatim, enriches built boss) + the rune-blessing confirmation (validates D2) + Sorcerer class. MEDIUM for the 'make you idle'=Paralyze inference; LOW for dungeon mapping/drops.
